perplexity: Use the exact Perplexity symbol: centered white knot/loop mark with interwoven geometry on dark background; no random abstract mark.
phonepe: Use the exact PhonePe mark: purple circular badge with white Devanagari-like glyph and dot; no alternate letterforms.
linkedin: Use the exact LinkedIn icon: white lowercase 'in' logomark on blue rounded square; no extra symbols.
makemytrip: Use the exact MakeMyTrip mark with the intertwined red and blue curved loops and yellow accent; preserve the recognizable swirl geometry.
notion: Use the exact Notion mark: black outlined cube-like square with uppercase N form; preserve minimal monochrome structure.
telegram-x: Use Telegram X paper-plane identity in Telegram blue style; crisp white plane geometry, no random glyph.
utorrent: Use uTorrent mark: white lowercase u in green circular badge; keep iconic shape proportions.
sheets: Use Google Sheets logo geometry: green document sheet with folded corner and white grid/table motif.
adobe-scan: Use Adobe Scan logo geometry: cyan/blue rounded square with stylized white scan ribbon shape.
kotak811: Use Kotak 811 style: Kotak red-blue identity with exact 811 text mark geometry adapted in plush style, no unrelated symbol.
bhim: Use BHIM identity: tricolor arrow motif with BHIM-style geometry and color order, not a generic payment icon.
redbus: Use redBus logo style: red primary with white bus motif/wordmark-inspired symbol, no unrelated transit icon.
snapseed: Use Snapseed icon style: green leaf over layered white/green tile motif.
gemini: Use Google Gemini logo style: blue-violet star/spark shape with clean gradient family and exact mark orientation.
ajio: Use the exact AJIO mark: a dark navy circle with a stylized uppercase 'A' monogram cut out inside (the A formed by the negative space, with a horizontal bar near the base); no wordmark, no unrelated letters, do NOT use the Myntra 'M'.
jiohotstar: Use the exact JioHotstar mark: a white/gold multi-pointed sparkle/star burst centered on a vivid blue-to-magenta gradient background; preserve the asymmetric spiky star geometry, no letters or wordmark.
wynk-music: Use the exact Wynk Music mark: a white musical note (single quaver/eighth note) with concentric ripple rings radiating around it on a red/pink gradient; preserve the note + ripple geometry, no letters or wordmark.
